queries.natural_language: List Segment, row_id, Currency from customers where Segment contains 'lam'.
queries.sql: SELECT "segment", "row_id", "currency" FROM "customers" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("segment" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%lam%');

queries.natural_language: List Segment, row_id, CustomerID from customers where Segment equals 'LAM'.
queries.sql: SELECT "segment", "row_id", "customer_id" FROM "customers" WHERE ("segment" = 'LAM');

queries.natural_language: List Segment, ChainID, Country from gasstations where Segment equals 'Noname'.
queries.sql: SELECT "segment", "chain_id", "country" FROM "gasstations" WHERE ("segment" = 'Noname');

queries.natural_language: List Segment, Country, row_id from gasstations where Segment contains 'noname'.
queries.sql: SELECT "segment", "country", "row_id" FROM "gasstations" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("segment" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%noname%');

queries.natural_language: List Date, Consumption, row_id from yearmonth where Date is <= 201205.
queries.sql: SELECT "date", "consumption", "row_id" FROM "yearmonth" WHERE (CAST("date" AS REAL) <= 201205);

queries.natural_language: List Amount, Time, ProductID from transactions_1k where Amount is <= 4.
queries.sql: SELECT "amount", "time", "product_id" FROM "transactions_1k" WHERE (CAST("amount" AS REAL) <= 4);

queries.natural_language: List Segment, Country, row_id from gasstations where Segment equals 'Other'.
queries.sql: SELECT "segment", "country", "row_id" FROM "gasstations" WHERE ("segment" = 'Other');

queries.natural_language: List Segment, ChainID, row_id from gasstations where Segment contains 'other'.
queries.sql: SELECT "segment", "chain_id", "row_id" FROM "gasstations" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("segment" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%other%');

queries.natural_language: Find CardID, GasStationID, ProductID from transactions_1k where CardID is <= 561544 and row_id is <= 237.
queries.sql: SELECT "card_id", "gas_station_id", "product_id" FROM "transactions_1k" WHERE (CAST("card_id" AS REAL) <= 561544) AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) <= 237);

queries.natural_language: Find GasStationID, Country, Segment from gasstations where GasStationID is <= 191 and row_id is >= 68.
queries.sql: SELECT "gas_station_id", "country", "segment" FROM "gasstations" WHERE (CAST("gas_station_id" AS REAL) <= 191) AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 68);

queries.natural_language: Find Segment, row_id, Country from gasstations where Segment equals 'Premium' and ChainID is <= 11.
queries.sql: SELECT "segment", "row_id", "country" FROM "gasstations" WHERE ("segment" = 'Premium') AND (CAST("chain_id" AS REAL) <= 11);

queries.natural_language: Find CustomerID, Consumption, Date from yearmonth where CustomerID is between 1380 and 2560 and row_id is <= 213.
queries.sql: SELECT "customer_id", "consumption", "date" FROM "yearmonth" WHERE (CAST("customer_id" AS REAL) >= 1380 AND CAST("customer_id" AS REAL) <= 2560) AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) <= 213);

queries.natural_language: Find Date, CustomerID, Consumption from yearmonth where Date is between 201207 and 201307 and row_id is >= 142.
queries.sql: SELECT "date", "customer_id", "consumption" FROM "yearmonth" WHERE (CAST("date" AS REAL) >= 201207 AND CAST("date" AS REAL) <= 201307) AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 142);

queries.natural_language: Find ProductID, CardID, Time from transactions_1k where ProductID is >= 5 and GasStationID is between 546 and 4347.
queries.sql: SELECT "product_id", "card_id", "time" FROM "transactions_1k" WHERE (CAST("product_id" AS REAL) >= 5) AND (CAST("gas_station_id" AS REAL) >= 546 AND CAST("gas_station_id" AS REAL) <= 4347);

queries.natural_language: Find Date, row_id, CustomerID from yearmonth where Date is <= 201303 and Consumption is >= 481.59.
queries.sql: SELECT "date", "row_id", "customer_id" FROM "yearmonth" WHERE (CAST("date" AS REAL) <= 201303) AND (CAST("consumption" AS REAL) >= 481.59);

queries.natural_language: Find row_id, Country, Segment from gasstations where row_id is >= 238 and ChainID is >= 2.
queries.sql: SELECT "row_id", "country", "segment" FROM "gasstations" WHERE (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 238) AND (CAST("chain_id" AS REAL) >= 2);

queries.natural_language: Find Consumption, Date, row_id from yearmonth where Consumption is <= 2217.72, CustomerID is <= 2560, and Consumption is >= 106.91.
queries.sql: SELECT "consumption", "date", "row_id" FROM "yearmonth" WHERE (CAST("consumption" AS REAL) <= 2217.72) AND (CAST("customer_id" AS REAL) <= 2560) AND (CAST("consumption" AS REAL) >= 106.91);

queries.natural_language: Find row_id, Time, CustomerID from transactions_1k where row_id is <= 204, GasStationID is <= 3396, and Price is <= 650.98.
queries.sql: SELECT "row_id", "time", "customer_id" FROM "transactions_1k" WHERE (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) <= 204) AND (CAST("gas_station_id" AS REAL) <= 3396) AND (CAST("price" AS REAL) <= 650.98);

queries.natural_language: Find Consumption, Date, CustomerID from yearmonth where Consumption is between 258.74 and 5478.07, row_id is between 71 and 284, and Consumption is <= 9533.91.
queries.sql: SELECT "consumption", "date", "customer_id" FROM "yearmonth" WHERE (CAST("consumption" AS REAL) >= 258.74 AND CAST("consumption" AS REAL) <= 5478.07) AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 71 AND CAST("row_id" AS REAL) <= 284) AND (CAST("consumption" AS REAL) <= 9533.91);

queries.natural_language: Find row_id, Consumption, CustomerID from yearmonth where row_id is >= 142, Date is >= 201207, and Date is <= 201307.
queries.sql: SELECT "row_id", "consumption", "customer_id" FROM "yearmonth" WHERE (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 142) AND (CAST("date" AS REAL) >= 201207) AND (CAST("date" AS REAL) <= 201307);
